content.full_text:
-

California
Fair Political
Practices Commission
October 3, 1989

Isabel Sewell
Friends of Library
800 Alma St.
Menlo Park, CA  94025

Re:  Your Request for Advice
Our File No. A-89-544

Dear Ms. Sewell:

You have requested advice regarding the campaign provisions
of the Political Reform Act of 1974.1

QUESTION

Where does the Friends of Menlo Park Library file the Form
461 as an independent expenditure committee?

CONCLUSION

If the Friends of Menlo Park qualifies as a city independent
expenditure committee, it must file its reporting statements with
the city clerk's office of the City of Menlo Park.

FACTS

After reviewing our advice letter No. I-89-449, you have
determined that the Friends of Menlo Park Library will qualify as
an independent expenditure committee. As such, you intend to file
the Form 461.

ANALYSIS

Section 84215 states, in part, that all committees formed or
existing primarily to support or oppose candidates or local
measures to be voted upon in one city, and city general purpose
committees, including independent expenditure committees, shall
file the original and one copy of their campaign reports with the
clerk of the city.

_______________________________

1  Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory
references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.
Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations
Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title
2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916) 322-5660

Isabel Sewell
Page Two


     If you have any additional questions, please call me at (916)
322-5662.

                                        Sincerely,

                                        Kathryn E. Donovan
                                        General Counsel

                                   By: Kevin S. Braaten-Moen
                                       Political Reform Consultant

89-544

FROM THE DESK OF

ISABEL SEWELL      FPPC

SEP 19 | 23 PM '89


Lessin Braaten - Moein
Casey Fair Federal Practices
425 J St  ste 200
Sacto CA 95804-0807
RE: I-89-449

Dear Sir                          Sept 16,1987

Thank you for your information
sent Sept 11. I have determined
that he friend of Mn P.Library will
be an Independent Expenditure Com
+ we will file with the city of Menlo
Park. Please send us form 461
I understand this need be filed
only with the City - right?

Thank you

Isabel Sewell
c/o Friends of Library
500 Alma St.
m P CA 94025

FROM THE DESK OF

ISABEL SEWELL FPPC
SEP 19 | 23 PM '89

Kevin Oraatson - Mayor
Daly Park Tabeau Frailties
428 J St Ste 900
Sacto CA 95804-L807
RE I-89-449

Dear Sir                                                                Sept 16,1989

Thank you for your information
sent Sept 11. I have determined
that the Friend of my PL library will
be an Independent Expenditure Comm
+ we wise file with the City of Mualō
Park. Please send use Form 461
I understand this need be filed
only with the City - right?

Thank you
Isabelle Sewell
c/o Friends of Library
800 Alema St.
m P CA 94025
